name: There’s No Longer Any Need for the Seven Warlords of the Sea!!!

issues.description: Second effect has trigger 'Trigger' which is incomplete/vague. Should specify actual trigger type (OnPlay, OnAttack, etc.) or be removed if not part of official text.
Second effect has maxCost 4, but official text specifies 'cost of 8 or less'. Both effects should have maxCost: 8.

target.subType: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
